metadata.name: Manage Compressed Tar Archives
metadata.description: Archive a directory tree and extract the archive content to another location
objectives: Create tar archives with different compression algorithms
Compare archive sizes between compression methods
Extract archive contents to a specified location

tasks.name: Verify /tmp/etc.tar archive exists
tasks.description: An uncompressed tar archive of /etc should exist at /tmp/etc.tar

tasks.name: Verify /tmp/etc.tar.gz archive exists
tasks.description: A gzip-compressed tar archive of /etc should exist at /tmp/etc.tar.gz

tasks.name: Verify /tmp/etc.tar.bz2 archive exists
tasks.description: A bzip2-compressed tar archive of /etc should exist at /tmp/etc.tar.bz2

tasks.name: Verify /tmp/etc.tar.xz archive exists
tasks.description: An xz-compressed tar archive of /etc should exist at /tmp/etc.tar.xz

tasks.name: Verify /backuptest directory exists
tasks.description: The /backuptest directory should exist for extracting archives

tasks.name: Verify /backuptest/etc directory exists
tasks.description: The extracted etc directory should exist in /backuptest
tasks.failure_message: Extracted etc directory does not exist in /backuptest
hints: Extract the archive: cd /backuptest && sudo tar -xzf /tmp/etc.tar.gz

tasks.name: Verify extracted files contain expected content
tasks.description: The extracted /backuptest/etc should contain typical configuration files
tasks.success_message: Extracted files are valid (passwd and hosts found)
tasks.failure_message: Extracted files are missing or incomplete
hints: Extract the archive: cd /backuptest && sudo tar -xzf /tmp/etc.tar.gz

tasks.name: Verify etc.tar.gz archive contains valid content
tasks.description: The tar.gz archive should list etc/ contents when viewed
tasks.failure_message: Archive does not contain expected etc/ content
